scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=8080 NODE_ENV=development npm run dev -w @workspace/api-server
scripts.dev:web: dotenv -e .env -- cross-env PORT=24527 BASE_PATH=/ npm run dev -w @workspace/codeflow
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
